recommendations.title: Lost Illusions
recommendations.overview: Lucien de Rubempré, a young, lower-class poet, leaves his family's printing house for Paris. Soon, he learns the dark side of the arts business as he tries to stay true to his dreams.

recommendations.title: The Apparition
recommendations.overview: Jacques Mayano, a French journalist who has lived a traumatic experience, is recruited by the Vatican to be part of a task force that must investigate the veracity of a supernatural apparition allegedly happened in a small French village.

recommendations.title: The Phantom of the Opera at the Royal Albert Hall
recommendations.overview: A disfigured musical genius, hidden away in the Paris Opera House, terrorises the opera company for the unwitting benefit of a young protégée whom he trains and loves. The 25th anniversary of the first public performance of Phantom of the Opera was c

recommendations.title: In the Beginning
recommendations.overview: France, present day. A professional conman passes himself off as the boss of a construction site building a highway extension. He cons the whole region, hires dozens of workers and cynically enjoys the profits of his scam until he meets the lady mayo

recommendations.title: The Phantom of the Opera
recommendations.overview: The deformed Phantom who haunts the Paris Opera House causes murder and mayhem in an attempt to make the woman he loves a star.

recommendations.title: BTS World Tour: Love Yourself - Japan Edition
recommendations.overview: BTS perform their Japan concert at Tokyo Dome and Fukuoka Yahuoku Dome during their Love Yourself World Tour.

recommendations.title: A Night at the Opera
recommendations.overview: The Marx Brothers take on high society and the opera world to bring two lovers together. A sly business manager and two wacky friends of two opera singers help them achieve success while humiliating their stuffy and snobbish enemies.

recommendations.title: Farinelli
recommendations.overview: The life and career of Italian opera singer Farinelli, considered one of the greatest castrato singers of all time.

recommendations.title: Fierce
recommendations.overview: Talent and passion for music can take one to the very top. On the way, however, there are going to be showbiz traps.

recommendations.title: Delirious
recommendations.overview: A soap opera writer gets hit on the head and wakes up as a character in his own show.
